body.docName: 分页查询耗材院内目录
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/consumables/page 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/consumables/page 
 ## 接口描述 
用于医招智付场景分页查询耗材院内目录信息，对应页面为医招智付-目录管理-耗材院内目录-全部院内目录处列表页，单次查询不能超过500条 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"productCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22HXQX21157F71%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"hospitalListIdList","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%221854422767814877186%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87500%E6%9D%A1"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable>


## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
  "productCodeList":["HXQX21157F71"],
  "hospitalListIdList":["1854422767814877186"],
  "start": 0,
  "limit": 50
}
```

## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1| 调用失败|
  | EROOR2| 执行失败，分页查出最大限制、当前企业未配置集采平台信息等|
  | SUC0000| 执行成功|

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/consumables/page

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/hospital-list/consumables/page

接口描述

用于医招智付场景分页查询耗材院内目录信息，对应页面为医招智付-目录管理-耗材院内目录-全部院内目录处列表页，单次查询不能超过500条

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"productCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22HXQX21157F71%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"hospitalListIdList","required":false,"label":"%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%221854422767814877186%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E500%E6%9D%A1"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87500%E6%9D%A1"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}
